name: 03-fresh-url-forward-only
description: Bootstrap with the --forward-only flag on a PR with prior reviews. Cursor pins to max(existing review id); the watcher skips history.

state_writes..muggle-do/sessions/acme-widget-pr142/pr: single entry: {repo:acme/widget, number:142, url:..., head_sha:abc1230, state:open}
state_writes..muggle-do/sessions/acme-widget-pr142/la: key 'acme/widget#142' with reviewId:4295962850 (max — --forward-only), last_pushed_sha:null, idle_tick_count:0, cycles_completed:0, escalated_review_ids:[], pushed_shas:[]
state_writes..muggle-do/sessions/acme-widget-pr142/st: PR url, slug, loop_user: stan4git, Bootstrapped from URL: yes

side_effects: Print bootstrap success summary (Cursor: review #4295962850, forward-only)
expected.notes: --forward-only restores the previous default behavior (pin past existing reviews). Use when bootstrapping a PR with stale/already-handled prior reviews.
